description: list active realtime alert rules from Alert Bridge (GET /api/v1/realtime) — Workflow D
rules: VLM real-time mode only — CV deployments do not run Alert Bridge subscriptions
read-only — an empty rule list is a valid success ('No realtime alert rules are currently running.'), not an error
the BARE GET /api/v1/realtime lists RULES (Workflow D); it is NOT an incident query — never use it to answer 'what happened' (that is Workflow C / the agent's get_incidents)
optional ALERT_TYPE adds ?alert_type=<TAG> to filter server-side
never expose raw rtsp:// / live_stream_url values to the user — reverse-resolve to the sensor name for display
usage: Set HOST_IP. Optional: ALERT_TYPE (server-side tag filter), ALERT_BRIDGE_URL (override base http://<HOST_IP>:9080). The porter GETs the rule list and records the HTTP status + rule count as one JSON audit line. Output: subscribe_list.json.
limitation: Requires the VSS alerts profile deployed in VLM real-time mode with Alert Bridge reachable at http://<HOST_IP>:9080. Offline / unreachable Alert Bridge degrades gracefully (records http_code=000, rule_count=unknown). Sensor-name reverse-resolution and rtsp:// redaction for display are performed by the caller via vss-manage-video-io-storage.
